notes: Migration script created and running in background (PID 16594). Actual migration rate is ~3.5 blocks/sec due to OpenAI API latency, which is slower than the brief's estimated 8-10 blocks/sec. Brief noted this would be the most expensive phase (~$3) but current cost is still accumulating. The deposit will be updated to 'complete' once migration finishes and validation passes.
